creator: freebsd.bug@nagykeve.e4ward.com
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #50)
With my bge-patched GENERIC kernels, WOL displayed on both 13.2R and 14.0R by default, without the need to issue an `ifconfig bge0 wol` or setting this in rc.conf. However, the wake-on-lan magic packet only woke the computers after they were shut down from the patched 13.2R, and did not wake either of them when they were shut down from the patched 14.0R or a not-yet-patched kernel from either version.
